title: Device Home Screen - Default Quick Settings
scenario: Default quick settings tiles on Device Home Screen correspond to first three options from Device Settings screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Observe the quick settings tiles displayed below the device image.
Note the three default quick settings tiles shown.
Tap the device name or gear icon to open Device Settings.
Observe the order of the first three options listed in the Device Settings screen.
Compare the three quick settings tiles on the Home screen with the first three options in Device Settings.
expected: The three default quick settings tiles displayed on the Home screen match the first three options listed in the Device Settings screen.
